channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ARISINFRA] ArisInfra Solutions KPIs for FY26: Revenue ₹10,674.63 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

ArisInfra Solutions Ltd disclosed its Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, as per SEBI (ICDR) Regulations, 2018. Key operational KPIs include the number of customers (3,292), vendors (2,155), and daily dispatches (816). Financial KPIs highlight revenue from operations at ₹10,674.63 million, a gross margin of ₹1,770.62 million, and an EBITDA of ₹1,007.40 million.

  • ArisInfra's FY26 revenue from operations reached ₹10,674.63 million.
  • Gross Margin for FY26 stood at ₹1,770.62 million.
  • The company reported 3,292 customers and 2,155 vendors in FY26.
  • EBITDA for FY26 was reported as ₹1,007.40 million.
  • Repeat customer percentage was 77.55% for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARISINFRA | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [CONTROLPR] Control Print Acquires IP Rights from CP Italy S.R.L for €2.86M
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Control Print Ltd has entered into an Intellectual Property Assignment Agreement with its step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, CP Italy S.R.L, to purchase its Intellectual Property Rights, including patents, for a consideration of Euros 2.86 Million. The transaction aims to consolidate the ownership of the intellectual property within Control Print Ltd. The agreement's effective date is May 8, 2026, and it was approved by the audit committee and board of directors on April 17, 2026. This transaction is considered a related party transaction and is conducted on an arm’s length basis.

  • Control Print acquires IP rights from CP Italy S.R.L for €2.86 million.
  • The acquisition aims to consolidate intellectual property ownership within Control Print.
  • CP Italy S.R.L is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Control Print B.V.
  • The IP Assignment Agreement is effective from May 8, 2026.
  • The transaction is a related party transaction done at arm's length.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CONTROL PRINT LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [DELHIVERY] Delhivery Board Meeting on May 16, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Delhivery Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 16, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities remains closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results, i.e., until May 18, 2026.

  • Delhivery's board will meet on May 16, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • The results are for the quarter and financial year ending March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window remains closed until May 18, 2026, post results declaration.
  • The announcement is available on the company's website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Delhivery Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BAJAJFINSV] Bajaj Finserv: Insurance Subsidiaries' April 2026 Premium Update
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Bajaj Finserv discloses the gross direct premium underwritten by Bajaj General Insurance Limited and new business information for Bajaj Life Insurance Limited for April 2026. Bajaj General Insurance's gross direct premium underwritten was ₹2,666 crore for April 2026, compared to ₹2,403 crore in April 2025. Bajaj Life Insurance's new business total premium was ₹936.99 crore for April 2026, compared to ₹719.37 crore in April 2025.

  • Bajaj General Insurance's gross direct premium underwritten for April 2026 was ₹2,666 crore.
  • Bajaj Life Insurance's total new business premium for April 2026 reached ₹936.99 crore.
  • Individual single premium for Bajaj Life Insurance was ₹68.96 crore in April 2026.
  • Group single premium for Bajaj Life Insurance was ₹422.03 crore in April 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAJAJ FINSERV LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [ZAGGLE] Zaggle Amends Customer Service Agreement with Honasa Consumer
item.description:
Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd has entered into an Amendment Agreement to its Customer Services Agreement with Honasa Consumer Limited, following an initial agreement dated February 24, 2025. The amendment, executed on May 08, 2026, involves Zaggle providing additional features to Honasa Consumer Limited on the Zaggle Zoyer Platform. This update is pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

  • Zaggle amends Customer Service Agreement with Honasa Consumer Limited.
  • Amendment executed on May 08, 2026.
  • Zaggle will provide additional features on the Zaggle Zoyer Platform.
  • Original Customer Service Agreement was dated February 24, 2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MOTHERSON] Motherson Guarantees €756M Revolving Credit for Subsidiary
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd. has issued a corporate guarantee in favor of lenders for a revolving credit facility availed by its wholly-owned subsidiary, Motherson Global Investments B.V. The facility amounts to EUR 720 million, with the company's potential liability capped at EUR 756 million. The guarantee is valid until August 15, 2029, and will replace an existing EUR 670 million facility, with an obligation of EUR 737 million continuing until August 16, 2026.

  • Motherson provides corporate guarantee for subsidiary's revolving credit.
  • The revolving credit facility is EUR 720 million, guaranteed up to EUR 756 million.
  • Guarantee validity extends to August 15, 2029.
  • Existing EUR 670 million facility will be cancelled, obligation continues until Aug 16, 2026.
  • No impact on the consolidated financial statements of the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd | Category: Loan & Debt

item.title: [TIPSFILMS] Tips Films Resubmits Audited Results for FY26
item.description:
Tips Films Ltd resubmitted its audited financial results along with the auditor's report for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, following an inadvertent omission of the auditor's report in the initial submission on May 08, 2026. The resubmission includes the auditor's report issued by Maheshwari & Co. Chartered Accountants and a declaration regarding the unmodified opinion on the audited financial results, in compliance with SEBI regulations. The company's audited financial results show a net sales/income from operations of ₹6,036.75 Lacs for the year ended March 31, 2026, compared to ₹15,827.14 Lacs for the year ended March 31, 2025.

  • Tips Films resubmitted audited financial results for FY26 due to a missing auditor's report.
  • Auditor's report was issued by Maheshwari & Co. Chartered Accountants.
  • FY26 net sales/income from operations stood at ₹6,036.75 Lacs.
  • Company reported a loss from operations before extraordinary items and tax of ₹3,271.15 Lacs.
  • The results have been prepared in accordance with Indian Accounting Standards (Ind AS).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tips Films Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SASKEN] Sasken Tech Recommends Final Dividend of ₹13
item.description:
Sasken Technologies Ltd has recommended a final dividend of ₹13 per equity share of ₹10 each for the year ended March 31, 2026, subject to member approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. This follows an interim dividend of ₹12 per share declared earlier on November 7, 2025. The board also approved the re-appointment of M/s. M S K A & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors for a second term of up to five consecutive years, from the conclusion of the 38th AGM till the conclusion of the 43rd AGM.

  • Sasken recommends final dividend of ₹13 per share for FY26.
  • Interim dividend of ₹12 per share was declared on November 7, 2025.
  • Re-appointment of M/s. M S K A & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors recommended.
  • Auditor re-appointment is for a term of up to 5 years.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sasken Technologies Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [IRMENERGY] IRM Energy Appoints Dalwadi & Associates as Cost Auditor
item.description:
IRM Energy Ltd's board approved the appointment of M/s Dalwadi & Associates as the Cost Auditor for the financial year 2026-27, following the recommendation of the Audit Committee. The board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹1.5 per equity share (15%) subject to shareholder approval. The meeting concluded at 08:47 P.M. (IST).

  • IRM Energy appoints M/s Dalwadi & Associates as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Board approved audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • A final dividend of ₹1.5 per share (15%) was recommended for FY 2026, pending shareholder approval.
  • Statutory Auditors issued unmodified opinion on the Audited Financial Results.
  • Board meeting was held on May 08, 2026, concluding at 08:47 P.M. (IST).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IRM Energy Ltd | Category: Auditor

item.title: [SASKEN] Sasken Tech: FY26 Final Dividend of ₹13 Per Share
item.description:
Sasken Technologies Ltd has announced its standalone and consolidated audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board has recommended a final dividend of ₹13 per equity share, subject to shareholder approval. This is in addition to the interim dividend of ₹12 per share declared earlier. The board also approved the re-appointment of M/s. M S K A & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors for a second term of up to five years.

  • Sasken Tech declares audited financial results for FY26.
  • Final dividend of ₹13 per share recommended.
  • Re-appointment of M/s. M S K A & Associates LLP as Statutory Auditors approved.
  • Interim dividend of ₹12 per share was previously declared.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sasken Technologies Ltd | Category: Dividend
